description: Estimated training age category used to scale complexity, volume tolerance, and exercise selection.
inferenceLogic: IF onboardingExperienceSelection contains 'Just starting out' THEN trainingAgeCategory = beginner
IF onboardingExperienceSelection contains '1-2 years' THEN trainingAgeCategory = intermediate
IF onboardingExperienceSelection contains '5+ years' OR 'advanced' THEN trainingAgeCategory = advanced

description: Estimated ability to recover from weekly training stress.
inferenceLogic: IF sleepQuality = poor OR stressLevel = high THEN recoveryCapacity = low
IF trainingAgeCategory = beginner AND daysAvailable >= 5 THEN recoveryCapacity = moderate or low
IF sleepQuality = good AND stressLevel = low AND trainingAgeCategory != beginner THEN recoveryCapacity = high

description: Estimated risk that a recommendation is too complex, frequent, or time-consuming for the user to follow consistently.
inferenceLogic: IF daysAvailable is high AND sessionLengthCategory = short THEN adherenceRisk = moderate
IF trainingAgeCategory = beginner AND split complexity is high THEN adherenceRisk = high
IF scheduleConsistency = stable AND sessionLengthCategory != short THEN adherenceRisk = low

description: Classifies preferred workout duration so rules can avoid recommending structures that require more time than the user has.
inferenceLogic: IF sessionLength <= 45 minutes THEN sessionLengthCategory = short
IF sessionLength > 45 minutes AND sessionLength <= 75 minutes THEN sessionLengthCategory = moderate
IF sessionLength > 75 minutes THEN sessionLengthCategory = long

description: Classifies equipment access so exercise and split recommendations match what the user can actually perform.
inferenceLogic: IF equipmentSelection contains 'Bodyweight only' THEN equipmentAccessLevel = bodyweight_only
IF equipmentSelection contains 'Dumbbells' AND NOT 'Full commercial gym' THEN equipmentAccessLevel = limited_home
IF equipmentSelection contains 'Full commercial gym' THEN equipmentAccessLevel = full_gym

description: Normalized primary training priority derived from the user's selected goals.
inferenceLogic: IF first selected goal contains 'stronger' THEN goalPriority = strength
IF first selected goal contains 'muscle' OR 'bigger' THEN goalPriority = hypertrophy
IF first selected goal contains 'fat' OR 'leaner' THEN goalPriority = fat_loss
IF first selected goal contains 'general fitness' THEN goalPriority = general_fitness

description: Estimated degree to which pain, injury, or movement limitations should constrain exercise selection and loading aggressiveness.
inferenceLogic: IF injuries is blank THEN injuryConstraintLevel = none
IF injuries contains mild discomfort THEN injuryConstraintLevel = minor
IF injuries contains pain during major movement patterns THEN injuryConstraintLevel = moderate
IF injuries describes medical restriction or severe pain THEN injuryConstraintLevel = major
